subcodes.first_line: O family and lineage of the steadfast and firmly-rooted Leaf, whom God hath raised up to the seat of truth in the presence of the Sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاندان و دودمان ورقه ثابته راسخه التی رفعها الله الی مقعد صدق عند ملیک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
